dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9406 IH: To amend title 38, United States Code, to eliminate the cap on the number of waivers to certain pay limitations that the Secretary of Veterans Affairs may issue for critical health care personnel of the Department of Veterans Affairs.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Harder of California (for himself and Mr. Wied) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to eliminate the cap on the number of waivers to certain pay limitations that the Secretary of Veterans Affairs may issue for critical health care personnel of the Department of Veterans Affairs.

section.header: Modification of limitation on waiver for pay of critical health care personnel of the Department of Veterans Affairs
section.text: Section 7431(e)(6) of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subparagraphs (E), (F), and (G) as subparagraphs (D), (E), and (F), respectively.
